overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin running along Del Perro Pier during sunset. The character moves from the main art deco building entrance past shops and amusement rides toward the ocean end of the pier, with the sun setting over the water creating long shadows and warm golden lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier entrance plaza with art deco building

events.description: character moves from concrete plaza onto wooden pier planks
character transitions from walking to running speed

agents.ego_description: character walks then runs from the plaza toward the pier entrance, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the building
pedestrian in white shirt standing near entrance

entered.detail: large art deco building with twin towers and central dome structure
weathered wooden planks forming the pier walkway
elevated concrete walkway with metal railing running parallel to pier

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in the concrete plaza facing the distinctive art deco Del Perro Pier building with its twin towers. The character moves forward onto the wooden pier planks, transitioning from walking to running as they approach the pier entrance. Other pedestrians are scattered around the plaza area, and an elevated overpass structure becomes visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered section of pier under elevated walkway

events.description: moving into shadow cast by the overpass structure
exiting the covered area as the overpass ends

agents.ego_description: character runs along the pier under the shadow of the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward camera under the overpass

entered.detail: concrete wall under overpass covered in colorful graffiti art
tall vintage-style lamp posts lining the pier

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the wooden pier under the elevated overpass structure, which creates a semi-covered environment with diffused lighting. The graffiti-covered walls of the underpass are visible on the right, while vintage street lamps line the left side. The main pier building recedes behind as the character moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open amusement pier with carnival rides and shops

events.description: Ferris wheel and amusement structures become prominent on the left
passing the Beach Surf shop with its distinctive red signage

agents.ego_description: character runs past various pedestrians and shops along the open pier

notable_agents.action: woman in bikini walking along the pier
person standing near the railing looking at the view

entered.detail: large amusement park Ferris wheel with enclosed cabins
single-story building with red Beach Surf signage and American flag
colorful carnival rides and structures including a tall spiral tower

segments.scene_description: The pier opens up into a wide amusement area with the Ferris wheel and colorful carnival rides visible on the left. The character runs past the Beach Surf shop on the right, which features prominent red signage. More pedestrians are present in this section, including people walking and standing near the railings. The sun casts long shadows across the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end with ocean overlook and beach views

events.description: ground surface changes to mixed concrete at the pier terminus
ocean and sandy beach become fully visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: character runs to the end of the pier overlooking the ocean and beach

notable_agents.action: person leaning on railing looking out at the ocean

entered.detail: calm sea with sun reflection creating a golden path on the water
sandy shoreline visible below the pier with gentle waves
metal safety railing with vertical bars along the pier edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the pier where the ocean and beach become the dominant features. The sun sits low over the water creating a brilliant golden reflection. The pier surface transitions to concrete near the terminus, and metal railings line the edge where people stand looking out at the water. A large cargo ship is visible in the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the urban concrete plaza of Del Perro Pier toward the open horizon of the Pacific Ocean during a golden sunset. It begins facing the twin towers of the art deco pier building, moving forward as the character transitions from a walk to a run across the wooden planks. As the camera passes under an elevated overpass, the environment briefly shifts into a semi-covered space with graffiti-covered walls and diffused lighting before opening up into a vibrant amusement area. The scene then expands to reveal a Ferris wheel and colorful carnival rides on the left and the red signage of the Beach Surf shop on the right, with long shadows stretching across the pier. Finally, the wooden surface gives way to concrete at the pier's terminus, where the view opens completely to a brilliant golden reflection on the water and a distant cargo ship on the horizon.
